column.text:
• New York Mets placed first baseman Jorge Polanco on the 60-day injured list with a right wrist contusion.
• Kansas City Royals placed right-hander Carlos Estévez on the 60-day injured list with a left foot contusion.
• Texas Rangers placed shortstop Corey Seager on the 7-day injured list, retroactive to June 12, with a concussion.
• Los Angeles Angels placed right-hander Grayson Rodriguez on the 15-day injured list with low back inflammation.
• Minnesota Twins designated shortstop Orlando Arcia for assignment.
• Los Angeles Angels designated left-hander Drew Pomeranz for assignment.
• Chicago Cubs designated left-hander Doug Nikhazy for assignment.
• Kansas City Royals traded right-hander Denis Samudio and cash to the Toronto Blue Jays for right-hander Connor Seabold.
• Arizona Diamondbacks activated left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr. from the 10-day injured list.
• Texas Rangers activated second baseman Josh Smith from the 10-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
